title: Extraction Protocol for Plant Material
author: Ricardo M. Borges
materials: Esquema para amostra de Controle de Qualidade Externo

steps.title: Grind the entire dried plant material...
steps.instruction: Grind the entire dried plant material using a "coffee grinder" until a homogeneous powder is obtained. Weigh and separate 10 grams for extraction into a 50 mL Falcon tubes. Store the remaining ground material in Falcon tubes.

steps.title: First Extraction Step
steps.instruction: First Extraction Step: Add 25 mL of the extraction solution to the 10 g of plant material. Mix using a vortex mixer. Sonicate for 5 minutes in an ultrasonic bath.

steps.title: Centrifugation
steps.instruction: Centrifugation: Centrifuge at 4000 RPM for 10 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: First Supernatant Collection
steps.instruction: First Supernatant Collection: Transfer 20 mL of the supernatant to a new 50 mL labeled Falcon tube.

steps.title: Second Extraction Step
steps.instruction: Second Extraction Step: Add another 25 mL of extraction solution to the plant residue. Mix using a vortex mixer for 30 seconds. Sonicate for another 5 minutes.

steps.title: Second Centrifugation
steps.instruction: Second Centrifugation: Centrifuge again at 4000 RPM for 10 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Second Supernatant Collection
steps.instruction: Second Supernatant Collection: Transfer 20 mL of the supernatant to the same 50 mL labeled Falcon tube for each sample respectively. Mix using a vortex mixer for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Dry the extracts (13 mL carbonized...
steps.instruction: Dry the extracts (13 mL carbonized glass tubes) using a SpeedVac concentrator.

steps.title: Transfer the dried extract to Eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Transfer the dried extract to Eppendorf tubes and record the weight for reference.

steps.title: Collect a small aliquot for Analysis
steps.instruction: Collect a small aliquot for Analysis: Collect 500 uL into a clean labeled vial for analytical data acquisition. Note: This sample can be directed to LC-MS (or NMR or LC-DAD) analysis for catalogation.

steps.title: Aliquotes for use and storage
steps.instruction: Aliquotes for use and storage: Separate the final content (~40 mL) into four (4) new different 13 mL carbonized glass tubes. Note: one of these 13 mL carbonized glass tubes can be weighted for reference. The other 3 tubes must have the same mass of the extract.

steps.title: Pesagem para microtubos De cada tubo...
steps.instruction: Pesagem para microtubos De cada tubo selecionado, é pesada uma alíquota de 10 mg. Essa alíquota é transferida para microtubos de 1.5 mL.

steps.title: Controle de Qualidade Externo (CQ externo)...
steps.instruction: Controle de Qualidade Externo (CQ externo) Estas amostras serão combinadas a seco em quantidades iguais (10 mg) em um tubo tipo falcon de 50 mL Esta amostra combinada será solubilizada e distribuída em vials de vidro de 1.5 mL Estas alíquotas serão evaporadas a secura para serem usadas como amostra de QC externo através dos diferentes lotes.
